description: Reglas de Firewall para LendCore - Importar en Cloudflare Dashboard

rules.name: Bloquear Países No-Europeos
rules.description: Solo permite tráfico desde España y Europa Occidental

rules.name: Protección Login - Rate Limit
rules.description: Máximo 5 intentos de login por 10 minutos

rules.name: Bloquear SQL Injection
rules.description: Detecta patrones de SQL injection en URL
rules.expression: (http.request.uri contains "union select" or http.request.uri contains "drop table" or http.request.uri contains "insert into" or http.request.uri contains "delete from")

rules.name: Bloquear XSS
rules.description: Detecta patrones de XSS en URL
rules.expression: (http.request.uri contains "<script" or http.request.uri contains "javascript:" or http.request.uri contains "onerror=")

rules.name: Bloquear Path Traversal
rules.description: Previene acceso a archivos del sistema

rules.name: Bloquear Bots Maliciosos
rules.expression: (http.user_agent contains "sqlmap" or http.user_agent contains "nikto" or http.user_agent contains "nmap" or http.user_agent contains "masscan" or http.user_agent contains "metasploit" or http.user_agent contains "burp")

rules.name: Proteger Admin Panel
rules.description: Extra seguridad para rutas de administración
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/dashboard/admin" or http.request.uri.path contains "/dashboard/configuracion" or http.request.uri.path contains "/dashboard/seguridad")

rules.name: Bloquear IPs en Blacklist
rules.note: Agregar IPs maliciosas detectadas en Analytics

instructions.step1: Ve a Cloudflare Dashboard → tu sitio → Security → WAF
instructions.step2: Click 'Create rule' para cada regla arriba
instructions.step5: Verifica en Analytics → Security que funcionan correctamente
